prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (twin-scroll, 76mm compressor wheel) for the **CWGD 4.0L V8 TFSI** engine, paired with a **Forge Motorsport** high-flow intercooler (bar-and-plate, 1200hp-rated) and **034 Motorsport** billet aluminum intake manifold with port-matched runners for optimized airflow at 2.2 bar boost (targeting 850hp on E85)

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition** titanium-coated downpipe (3.5" diameter, de-catted) with a **Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium** exhaust system (dual 3.5" outlets, valve-controlled, 10% weight reduction over stock), mated to a **Unitronic Stage 3+ ECU/TCU** tune with custom ethanol mapping and launch control optimized for the **ZF 8HP95X** transmission (0-60mph in 2.5s)

Replace the stock **Audi RS adaptive air suspension** with **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way** coilovers (10-position rebound, 12-position compression, adjustable top mounts) and **H&R** 20mm front / 15mm rear sway bars (solid, adjustable links), paired with **AP Racing** 400mm 6-piston front / 380mm 4-piston rear brake kit (two-piece rotors, RSL2 pads) for track use
estetica: Install a **Prior Design PD8XX** widebody kit (carbon fiber, 50mm front / 70mm rear fender flares) with **Rocket Bunny** overfenders (pre-preg carbon, bolt-on) and a **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber front splitter (3D-molded, 3-stage adjustable dive planes) for aggressive aero balance

Replace the stock wheels with **BBS FI-R** (21x10.5 ET35 front / 21x12.5 ET45 rear, 5x112 PCD) in **Forgeline CF10** finish, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (285/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear) for maximum mechanical grip and heat cycling

Add a **Novitec Torado** carbon fiber engine cover (visible through the rear glass) with **Vossen** forged aluminum oil cap and **AWE Tuning** carbon fiber side skirts (matte finish), paired with **Lux H8 V4** angel eyes (8,000K, sequential startup animation) and **Morimoto** XB LED headlights (DRLs with adaptive cornering)
